vocab.example: I'm deeply fascinated by architectural aesthetics, especially the way light interacts with glass surfaces.
Modern skyscrapers often feature intricate geometric patterns that look stunning when captured from a low angle.

vocab.meaning: sự hùng vĩ/vẻ tráng lệ mang tính lịch sử
vocab.example: Taking photos of ancient temples allows me to preserve the historical grandeur of my country's heritage.
The weathered stone walls of the old fortress are a testament to the endurance of medieval craftsmanship.

vocab.meaning: sự đối xứng và tỉ lệ
vocab.example: I always strive to find the perfect symmetry and proportion in my shots to create a sense of visual balance.

vocab.meaning: phong cảnh thành phố rực rỡ/sôi động
vocab.example: I love venturing out at night to photograph vibrant cityscapes with neon lights reflecting off the facades.

vocab.meaning: sự tương phản gay gắt/rõ rệt
vocab.example: Photography highlights the stark contrast between colonial-style villas and the surrounding steel skyscrapers.
I often stop in my tracks just to behold the beauty of a well-designed building before pulling out my camera.

vocab.meaning: sự mở rộng đô thị (thường mang nghĩa tiêu cực)
vocab.example: My photo series documents how the urban sprawl is gradually consuming the traditional architecture of the outskirts.
Macro photography allows me to focus on the meticulous craftsmanship found in the hand-carved window frames of old houses.
